# ChocoLux

> Luxury handcrafted chocolates, gourmet truffles, and premium gift boxes — made fresh daily and delivered with care.

ChocoLux is an online chocolate boutique offering single-origin cacao creations, signature truffles, and curated gift collections.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand story, featured chocolates, and signature collection highlights.
- [Shop](/shop): Browse the full ChocoLux catalog with search, category filters, and sort.

## Optional

- [Sign In](/login): Customer sign-in for order history and faster checkout.
- [Create Account](/register): Join ChocoLux to track orders and unlock member benefits.
